feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Is it possible to change the worker-id in S/4HANA Public Cloud Systems?
entry.content:
Hello all,

Is it possible to change the Worker-ID for a user in the SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud?  If yes, how?

We created some users during the initial PREPARE Phase with format first.lastname, as the worker/employee ID was unavailable then.

Is it now possible to change the field now?

Thanks in advance and best regards,

Shaji

entry.title: How to allocate revenue in Plan
entry.content:
Hi Experts，

I want to allocate revenue of a profit center in Plan. We I created a distribution by Manage Allocation, I found it's impossible to add a revenue account into segment. the account prefixed with 4 were disappeared in Select:Account Number window. do you meet the same thing? and is it design like this, Revenu can't be distributed by Universal Allocation?

entry.title: Hi, Encrytion using Class or API in RAP public cloud
entry.content:
Hi,

I want to encrypt the data in RAP public cloud can anyone help how we can get encrypt and decrypt. As i had try using Cl_sec_sxml_writer but this cannot use in RAP

entry.title: Project Planning app F3822 missing in Public Cloud Business Catalogs
entry.content:
Dear All, 

in our start system for Public Cloud V2402 I am trying to use app "Project Planning" app F3822. However when I search , the app does not come up. When I check roles and Business catalogs which should contain this app (based on SAP Library) , it is not there. 

I checked below roles and catalogs in our system and the app is not there

 

Example:

Any idea why this app is missing and how can this be corrected? 

Regards,
Jakub

entry.title: Customer address in coordinates, not street/postal code/etc
entry.content:
Hello,

I have the requirement to not use street/postal code/house number etc in the customer's address, but instead use geo coordinates (longitude/latitude). I have not found anything online how to set this up in public cloud. Is this possible and if yes, how? The only thing I found was this help.sap.com page that is for on-prem Link.

I have also found this old community question Link . But I cannot find that BADI in public cloud.

However, here the coordinates are derived from the address. The requirement is that we do not want anything to do with the address, but only the coordinates.

Kind Regards,

RP

entry.title: How can I Copy Material Master in S/4HANA Public Cloud?
entry.content:
How can I Copy Material Master in S/4HANA Public Cloud? We have a requirement in a Chemical Industry where we have to Mask Material Description as they can be seen by the Master Data Team but while creating a PR/PO that description needs to be masked to something generic.

 

Since we do not have Masking mechanism in Public Cloud through SAP Security how can we duplicate this Material Creation in another Material Group. Customer does not want any manual task. It should be automatically be created at the point of Unmasked Material Creation.

 

What approach should be the Best?

SAP Business Process Automation

SAP Build Automation

SAP Custom Business Object

Etc.

Please also kindly provide steps and an API that we can use to achieve this. 

 

Thanks

Arghadip

@arghadipkar3013

entry.title: CDS View to Get Billing Document Number and Sales Order Number
entry.content:
Good day!

I would like to ask if there is any available CDS where I can obtain the Billing document number of a specific Sales order. A view where it indicates the specific number of both Sales Order Number & Billing Document Number or Sales Order Number & Invoice Number. I can't seem to find the specific CDS during my own investigation.

Any inputs would be appreciated.

Regards,

Evans Aarons

entry.title: 请问S/4 HANA有相关GMP认证中关于IOQ相关的材料吗
entry.content: IOQ是指验证设备安装和运行资格的过程术语，请问S/4 HANA有相关GMP认证中关于IOQ相关的材料吗

entry.title: #CoE#JMTHYbom行项目变更编号控制
entry.content: 做了校验增强，前台变更编号有值还是会报错、问下各位老师有什么解决办法

entry.title: DMC:Value XX cannot be converted; integer part can have maximum XX digits error for custom field
entry.content:
Hello,

One of my project while tyring to migrate customer I got the error message "Value 10 cannot be converted; integer part can have maximum 1 digits." for a numeric custom field that has 3 intiger and 2 decimal digits in conversion phase. 

None of the Length of data in that field is exceeding the given value. By the way in migration template the intiger part and decimal part is written as 3 and 2 but when there is a value more than 1 digit it gives above error.

How can I solve this issue?

entry.title: Mass maintenance of business partner
entry.content:
Hi all,

i would like to know if there is some possibility to create some fields and data through the new app Start/Manage Mass maintenance.

Issue is that in the old app Mass Maintenance Material(in this case we need to do mass maintenance of business partner) there is a possibility choose Data Record to be created.

In the new app, if the data doesnt exist, system will not create them. Is there any way to create these data in app Manage Mass Maintenance? When we started a process in new app, it was completed successfully, but  records were not created

Thx for help,

entry.title: Pricing procedure determination for Free of Charge process
entry.content: I work with the S4H public cloud, release 2402. In the free of charge process the order type is CBFD. The pricing procedure is Y40101 (for Croatia). I want to change the pricing procedure for this order type. In Central Business Configuration (CBC), in the 'Set Pricing Procedure Determination' menu (ID 101118), the procedure Y40101 is not mentioned. Also, when searching the document classification for pricing procedure determination field, none of the options seems relevant for the free of charge orders. How is the pricing procedure for the free of charge process (order type CBFD) determined?

entry.title: STO not showing in Monitor external and internal requirements Fiori app
entry.content:
In Monitor internal requirements and Monitor External requirements  Stock Transport Related Receipts not showing (PRqRel or Trn Res)

But in MD04 in under filter Requirements and stocks STP receipts showing 

My questions is STO is a requirement but why Fiori App not showing

entry.title: Dunning Procedure
entry.content:
Hi all,
I am setting up a customized Dunning process in a partner demo environment.
Therefore, I assigned a value to the BP item “Dunning Procedure”.
However, the input values could not be saved due to the following error.

Error:
No dunning settings have been maintained for company code 1510

So I wanted to set up SSCUI 105758 (Manage Dunning Control for Company Codes).
However, this SSCUI is restricted to new entries and does not allow new company codes to be registered.
How can this problem be resolved?

entry.title: Automatic account determination
entry.content:
Dear community,

Our client have a special requirement for the account determination on material on S4 Public Cloud.

He needs to have the following schemes :

For material entry :

Debit on stock account (BSX)

Credit on supplier account  (WRX)


For stock consumption :

Debit on charge account (EKG)

Credit on stock (BSX)

 

For invoice entry :

Debit on supplier account (WRX)

Credit on final supplier account

 

Usually, EKG is used for material entry, not for stock consumption.

 

They do not use stock variation account.

My question is can we change on Public cloud the standard schemes  ?

Thank you for your help!

 

Kind regards,

entry.title: Unable to create E-Way Bill for Sub Contracting Challan in S/4Hana Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hi My SAP Family,

Can we generate E-Document Cockpit(India E-Way Bill) for Sub Contract Challan document(PO Process).

Please guide me.

Thanks and Regards,

Mansoor

entry.title: How to create a Sales Order in the new fiori application with configurable materials ?
entry.content:
Hello experts, 

I am working on S/4 HANA Cloud: Public edition version 2402 and am not able to access the modification feature of characteristic values for configurable materials which is the following screen, when creating and/or editing a sales order in the new fiori application: 

In the "change Sales Order", when adding a new item to my Sales Order with a configurable material => I was expecting to have the popup above to be able to modify the configuration variant data! 

But no popup is displayed.

Then If I go to the "display sales order" => I can see a "configuration column" for configurable materials:

This "configuration column" is displayed in the "display SO" new fiori app, but IS NOT not shown when switching to the Edit mode) => is that normal? something is missing or this is a bug to raise to SAP?

On the other hand, if I use the "change Sales Order - VA02" application from whitin the fiori launchpad, I can see the "old" configuration button which allows me to access the variant configuration modification feature: 

Is this feature "hidden"? "not available" yet?

Thanks all

entry.title: SAP S4HANA Cloud - how to add multiple filters to expression-based filter in custom CDS view
entry.content:
Hi,

I need to add multiple filters in expression based. Where can I find any documentation about the syntax and examples?

 

 

 

Regards,

Minh

entry.title: I am unable to create E-way bill for Subcontracting Challan
entry.content:
Hi SAP Family,

I am unable to create E-Way Bill in E-Document Cockpit based on Delivery challan.

We are creating Delivery challan using Outbound Delivery number for Subcontracting process.

Please guide me or suggest me any documents (SAP documents) related to this.

entry.title: Milestone Billing - SAP SD
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I am trying to replicate PS Milestone Billing Scenario in Public Cloud. However, I cannot find any option to create Milestone at WBS or Network Activities. But In the Billing Plan tab of Sales Order I find the Milestone option and when I click on it, it gives me to choose between WBS/ Network. 

Firstly, I wanted to know if we could create Milestones at WBS/ Activities and Second, I wanted to know if there are any CBC configs required for Milestone Billing from Professional Services/Project Management.

Customer is an AD service company, and we are going to use Milestone Billing solution in place.

When I create a Sales Order line item there is two options one for Create Dates and one for Milestones and it is asking for Network and WBS element. I have no clue what these are and how to create them. 

Or is it possible to create a milestone billing plan without Project Systems?

Could somebody guide me with the above, thank you!

-Brinda S

SAP S/4HANA SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud SAP S/4HANA Cloud for Sales SD (Sales and Distribution) SAP Commercial Project Management for SAP S/4HANA SAP Commercial Project Management
